summary: Extract one channel (by 0-based index) of an Image into a single-channel Field1 scalar field, copied verbatim, with explicit semantic role and valid range.

inputs.name: image
inputs.doc: The image to extract a channel from.

outputs.name: field
outputs.doc: The extracted channel as a single-channel scalar field.

params.name: semantic
params.doc: The semantic role of the extracted scalar field.

params.name: range
params.doc: The valid-range policy of the extracted field; defaults to unbounded.

perceptual.reason: image.extract_channel copies one channel verbatim into a Field1; correctness is verified by an exact channel-selection fixture and a round-trip with image.assemble_channels, not a perceptual metric
